resources.string: Gently pauses distracting apps until you pray

SadhanaLock uses this service ONLY to detect which app is in the foreground, so it can show a prayer (sadhana) screen before you open an app you chose to lock. It does not read screen content, collect text, or transmit any data.
Tells you if the prayer lock has stopped working
Tap to re-enable the prayer lock
Take a breath. Remember the divine before you scroll.
It is night. Rest now — apps unlock in the morning.
